name: Marinara Sauce (Cleary)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until fragrant, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in chopped parsley and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add mushrooms and sauté until they release their moisture and begin to brown, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Mix in crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, water, A1 sauce, barbecue sauce, ketchup, and oregano.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the sauce thickens.
